displayDescription.zh:
1983 年，斯科特·柯克帕特里克、C·丹尼尔·格拉特 Jr. 和马里奥·P·维基把统计物理中的退火过程系统地转化为组合优化方法。算法始终接受更优解；面对代价增加量为 ΔE 的较差解时，则以约 exp(-ΔE/T) 的概率接受，从而在高温阶段越过局部最优，随后随温度降低逐渐转向精细搜索。

这一方法继承了 1953 年 Metropolis 等人提出的随机采样思想，并用“温度”和“降温计划”控制探索与收敛之间的平衡。理论研究表明，足够缓慢的降温可以带来渐近收敛性质，但实际系统通常采用更快的计划换取可接受的运行时间；这种权衡后来持续影响电路布局、调度、路径规划以及混合元启发式优化。
displayDescription.en:
In 1983, Scott Kirkpatrick, C. Daniel Gelatt Jr., and Mario P. Vecchi systematically turned the annealing process from statistical physics into a method for combinatorial optimization. The algorithm always accepts an improvement; for a worse candidate with cost increase ΔE, it accepts with probability approximately exp(-ΔE/T), allowing high-temperature search to cross local barriers before cooling shifts the process toward refinement.

The method adapted the stochastic sampling idea introduced by Metropolis and colleagues in 1953, using temperature and a cooling schedule to balance exploration against convergence. Theory showed that sufficiently slow cooling can provide asymptotic convergence properties, while practical systems usually cool faster to obtain useful answers in reasonable time; that tradeoff has continued to influence circuit placement, scheduling, routing, and hybrid metaheuristics.

description.en: The 1983 primary paper connecting statistical mechanics with multivariate and combinatorial optimization.
description.zh: 1983 年原始论文，将统计力学与多变量、组合优化联系起来。

license.en: Publisher record; access conditions are set by Science.
license.zh: 出版方论文记录，访问条件由《科学》网站规定。

html.zh: 20 世纪 50 年代的 Metropolis 方法已经展示了如何按热平衡概率对物理状态进行随机采样，但它最初不是为工程优化提出的。1983 年的模拟退火论文把固体退火类比带入组合优化，使研究者能够用受控的“上坡”移动处理容易困住贪心搜索的巨大搜索空间。
html.en: The Metropolis method of the 1950s had already shown how to sample physical states according to thermal probabilities, but it was not originally framed as an engineering optimizer. The 1983 simulated annealing paper carried the solid-annealing analogy into combinatorial optimization, giving researchers controlled uphill moves for search spaces that trap greedy improvement.

html.zh: 算法无条件接受降低代价的候选，并以约 exp(-ΔE/T) 的概率接受代价更高的候选；因此同一个坏移动在高温时更可能通过。降温计划逐步降低这种容忍度，让搜索从跨越能垒的广泛探索转向低代价区域内的精细调整。
html.en: The algorithm accepts every cost-reducing candidate and accepts a higher-cost candidate with probability approximately exp(-ΔE/T), so the same bad move is more likely to pass at high temperature. A cooling schedule gradually removes that tolerance, shifting search from broad barrier crossing to refinement inside lower-cost regions.

html.zh: 专家通常把模拟退火视为连接统计物理与现代元启发式优化的经典方法，而不是快速获得全局最优的保证。早期理论工作说明极慢降温可带来渐近收敛性质，工程实践则更重视在解质量和运行时间之间折中；这种思想至今仍见于调度、路径规划、电路布局和混合搜索。
html.en: Experts generally treat simulated annealing as a classic bridge between statistical physics and modern metaheuristic optimization, not as a promise of quick global optimality. Early theory established asymptotic properties for very slow cooling, while engineering practice emphasizes the tradeoff between solution quality and runtime; the idea remains influential in scheduling, routing, circuit placement, and hybrid search.

notes.zh: 已补充技术机制、历史源流、收敛权衡、人物头像及图片来源。
notes.en: Technical mechanism, historical lineage, convergence tradeoff, portrait, and image provenance have been enriched.

模拟退火论文共同作者、IBM 研究员

workAuthors.en: Scott Kirkpatrick, C. Daniel Gelatt Jr., and Mario P. Vecchi, Science, 1983
workAuthors.zh: 斯科特·柯克帕特里克, C·丹尼尔·格拉特 Jr.、马里奥·P·维基, 《科学》, 1983

quotePage.zh: BenchCouncil AI100：优化算法 / 模拟退火

quoteAttribution.en: Optimization by Simulated Annealing, Scott Kirkpatrick, C. Daniel Gelatt Jr., and Mario P. Vecchi, Science, 1983
quoteAttribution.zh: 《模拟退火优化》, 斯科特·柯克帕特里克, C·丹尼尔·格拉特 Jr.、马里奥·P·维基, 《科学》, 1983

method.en: Metropolis acceptance with a cooling schedule
method.zh: 结合 Metropolis 接受准则与降温计划的概率搜索

material.en: Science paper on optimization by annealing
material.zh: 《科学》 模拟退火优化论文

demo.en: Accept worse moves with exp(-ΔE/T), then reduce T
demo.zh: 按 exp(-ΔE/T) 接受较差移动，再逐步降低 T

text.en: Temperature controls the probability of accepting a worse move; higher T makes barrier crossing more likely.
text.zh: 温度参数控制算法接受较差移动的概率；T 越高，越容易跨越能垒。

text.en: The schedule lowers temperature, shifting search from broad exploration to local refinement and setting the quality-runtime tradeoff.
text.zh: 降温计划逐渐降低温度，使搜索从广泛探索转向局部精修，并决定质量与耗时的权衡。

text.en: Improvements are accepted; a worse move of ΔE is accepted with probability approximately exp(-ΔE/T).
text.zh: 更优移动直接接受；代价增加 ΔE 的较差移动以约 exp(-ΔE/T) 的概率接受。

description.en: The 1983 primary paper connecting statistical mechanics with multivariate and combinatorial optimization.
description.zh: 1983 年原始论文，将统计力学与多变量、组合优化联系起来。
